Total GEX deeply negative across all expiries (-40.76B combined) means dealers must sell into declines and buy into rallies, amplifying all moves. 0DTE shows reverse_smirk (bullish skew) but Weekly/Monthly show smirk (bearish hedging) - suggesting short-term optimism trapped in longer-term fear. Spot at 6399.5 is pinned at 6400 RESONANCE level with extraordinary 0DTE volume (102,026 contracts). Max Pain at 6600 provides upside target but heavy PUT OI structure suggests downside pressure.
